name: Potato Cheddar Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/3 can Chef-Mate Sharp Cheddar Cheese Sauce (10 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Add vegetable oil to a large stockpot. Stir in carrots, celery, and onions.
Saute for 15 minutes over medium heat. Add potatoes and continue sauteing for an additional 5 minutes.
2. Combine the remaining ingredients with the vegetable mixture. Stir thoroughly.
3. Bring the soup to serving temperature. Simmer gently for 10 minutes, stirring constantly to prevent scorching.
Makes 30 servings of one cup each.
Source: Carnation Company
